opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a massive, throbbing lump on the back of my neck. I can't move my head, and I've been getting chills all afternoon.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A rapidly growing painful lump on my neck with chills and feeling unwell.

symptom_narrative.onset: small tender red bump 4 days ago
symptom_narrative.character: firm, hot, throbbing lump with a yellow-white tip
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe throbbing pain, can't move neck
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: chills, low-grade fever, feeling generally unwell, neck stiffness
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: neck movement very restricted; lives alone

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no current antibiotics or regular medicines

communication_style.typical_message_style: in pain, focused on the lump

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home thermometer reading; low-grade fever

objective_data_offered.value: a 5 cm hot, red, very tender lump on the back of the neck with a soft yellow-white pointing tip and redness spreading a couple of cm around it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate fluctuance or assess depth
